description.zh-CN: 本次更新优化了整体流畅度，并修复了详情页相关问题。
description.en: This update improves overall smoothness and fixes issues related to the detail page.

zh-CN.title: 优化
items: 优化列表左滑删除动画手感。

zh-CN.title: 修复
items: 修复详情页面状态栏没有沉浸的问题。
修复详情页面无法选择重复周期预设的问题。

en.title: Improvements
items: Improved the feel of the swipe-left delete animation in lists.

en.title: Fixes
items: Fixed the detail page status bar not being immersive.
Fixed an issue where repeat cycle presets could not be selected on the detail page.
